name: @markdown-embed-github/core
description: Shared core resolver and styles for GitHub source embeds in markdown processors
author: ubugeeei

scripts.format: oxfmt --write src test README.md package.json tsconfig.json tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.mjs assets
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src test README.md package.json tsconfig.json tsdown.config.ts vitest.config.mjs assets
scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
